user.title: Connect to HomeHoard
user.description: Add-on users are set up automatically. Only fill in an API token if your HomeHoard has authentication enabled — generate one in HomeHoard under “Home Assistant”.

data.token: API token (only if auth is enabled)

hassio_confirm.title: HomeHoard add-on discovered
hassio_confirm.description: Do you want to set up the **{addon}** add-on?

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect. Make sure HomeHoard is installed and running.
error.invalid_auth: HomeHoard rejected the request. Enter a valid API token (generate one in HomeHoard under “Home Assistant”).

abort.cannot_connect: Could not reach HomeHoard. Start it and try again from Settings → Devices & Services.

data_description.update_interval: How often to fetch inventory statistics. Minimum 30 s, maximum 3600 s.
